plan.cmd: mc agent spawn --agent receptionist --model claude-haiku-4-5 --prompt "Classify this inbound message into exactly one of: work_order | client_update | sales | support. Also extract any context (sender, urgency, referenced asset). Output JSON: { \"route\": ..., \"context\": {...} }. Capture to Obsidian. Inbound: \"Tenant at 145 Cedar reports kitchen faucet leaking, says it's been 2 days\""

mc agent spawn --agent dispatcher --model claude-sonnet-4-6 --prompt "If the Receptionist's classification routes to dispatcher, take ownership of the inbound, generate a structured work order, and emit work_order.json. If the route does not match this agent, exit silently."

mc agent spawn --agent account_manager --model claude-sonnet-4-6 --prompt "If the Receptionist's classification routes to account_manager, take ownership of the inbound, draft a client status update, and emit client_update.md. If the route does not match this agent, exit silently."

mc agent spawn --agent marco_deluca --model claude-sonnet-4-6 --prompt "If the Receptionist's classification routes to marco_deluca, take ownership of the inbound, enqueue an outbound sales response, and emit sales_proposal.md. If the route does not match this agent, exit silently."

mc agent spawn --agent pia_sandoval --model claude-sonnet-4-6 --prompt "If the Receptionist's classification routes to pia_sandoval, take ownership of the inbound, open a support ticket, and emit support_resolution.md. If the route does not match this agent, exit silently."
